documentTitle: Automation Testing Practice Website for QA and Developers | UI and API

issues.message: Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.
issues.selector: html > body > header > nav > a

issues.message: This element has insufficient contrast at this conformance level. Expected a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1, but text in this element has a contrast ratio of 3.01:1. Recommendation:  change background to #c35600.

issues.selector: #support-coffee > p > a

issues.message: Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.

issues.message: If this element contains a navigation section, it is recommended that it be marked up as a list.
issues.selector: #home-header > div:nth-child(3) > div > div

issues.message: This textinput element does not have a name available to an accessibility API. Valid names are: label element, title , aria-label , aria-labelledby .
issues.context: <input type="text" class="form-control" id="search-input" placeholder="Search an example...">
issues.selector: #search-input

issues.message: This form field should be labelled in some way. Use the label element (either with a "for" attribute or wrapped around the form field), or "title", "aria-label" or "aria-labelledby" attributes as appropriate.
issues.context: <input type="text" class="form-control" id="search-input" placeholder="Search an example...">
issues.selector: #search-input
